title: Unauthenticated users can hit finance views that assume an authenticated user
reasoning: Several finance views omit LoginRequiredMixin while reading request.user or exposing finance-related pages. Unlike the list/add views, unauthenticated requests are not redirected to login; views that query user-owned models may error with AnonymousUser, and settings/report/calendar pages are reachable without the same authentication gate as the rest of the finance feature.
reproduction: As an anonymous user, request routes such as /calendar/ or /transaction/1/edit/. These classes do not enforce login before executing their handlers.
recommendation: Add LoginRequiredMixin to every finance view that displays or mutates user finance data, including edit/delete, calendar, settings, and report views.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: There are no access-control tests in Finances/tests.py.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add tests asserting anonymous GET/POST requests to every finance URL redirect to login, and authenticated users can only access objects they own.
minimumFixScope: Add LoginRequiredMixin consistently across the affected class-based views.
